---
title: "Education & Work"
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
---

## Education

- PhD in \| <a href="https://slat.arizona.edu/" target="_blank">Second Language Acquisition & Teaching</a> \| 2005 \| <a href="https://www.arizona.edu/" target="_blank">University of Arizona</a> \| Tucson, Arizona

- MA in <a href="https://www.middlebury.edu/institute/academics/degree-programs/language-education" target="_blank">Teaching of English to Speakers of Other Languages</a> \| 1997\ | <a href="https://www.middlebury.edu/institute" target="_blank">Monterey Institute of International Studies</a> \| Monterey, California

- BS in <a href="https://www.sjsu.edu/cob" target="_blank">International Business</a> \| 1990\ | <a href="https://www.sjsu.edu" target="_blank">San José State University</a> \| San José, California

## Employment
